mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_llm_call (trace_id, call_type, model, round_num, system_prompt, user_prompt, raw_response, input_tokens, output_tokens, total_tokens, latency_ms, success, error_message, created_at) VALUES (#{traceId}, #{callType}, #{model}, #{roundNum}, #{systemPrompt}, #{userPrompt}, #{rawResponse}, #{inputTokens}, #{outputTokens}, #{totalTokens}, #{latencyMs}, #{success}, #{errorMessage}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM agent_llm_call WHERE trace_id = #{traceId} ORDER BY id

SELECT DATE(created_at) AS date, COUNT(*) AS call_count, SUM(input_tokens) AS total_input, SUM(output_tokens) AS total_output, SUM(total_tokens) AS total_tokens FROM agent_llm_call WHERE created_at BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY date

SELECT call_type, COUNT(*) AS call_count, SUM(input_tokens) AS total_input, SUM(output_tokens) AS total_output, SUM(total_tokens) AS total_tokens, AVG(latency_ms) AS avg_latency FROM agent_llm_call WHERE created_at BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY call_type

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_calls, SUM(CASE WHEN success = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS success_calls, SUM(CASE WHEN success = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failed_calls, COALESCE(SUM(total_tokens), 0) AS total_tokens, COALESCE(AVG(latency_ms), 0) AS avg_latency_ms FROM agent_llm_call WHERE created_at BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}
